<script lang="ts">
  import { Progress } from "$lib/registry/ui/progress/index.js"
  import { onMount } from "svelte"

  let value = $state(13)

  onMount(() => {
    const timer = setTimeout(() => (value = 66), 500)
    return () => clearTimeout(timer)
  })
</script>

<Progress {value} max={100} class="w-[60%]" />
